phrases.text_local: Onde fica o caixa do salão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: This cashier handles payments for table service.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I place bulk orders?
phrases.text_local: Onde coloco pedidos em grandes quantidades?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-LAW-koo peh-DEE-doosh AYNG GRAHNNG-dihsh kwahnng-tee-DAH-dihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Bulk pastry orders are managed at a dedicated station.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I place bulk orders?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso fazer um pedido por atacado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo fuh-ZEHR OONNG peh-DEE-doo POOR uh-tuh-KAH-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Bulk orders are handled at a dedicated counter, not the regular cashier.

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um funcionário da loja.

phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar onde fica o caixa do salão?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN?

likely_response.local: Ao fundo, à direita do balcão de pastéis.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo, AH dee-RAY-tuh DOO bahl-KOWN DIH puhsh-TEHEESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the salon cashier, near the waiters.

responses.english: Go to the salon cashier, near the waiters.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo, AH dee-RAY-tuh DOO bahl-KOWN DIH puhsh-TEHEESH.
responses.local: Ao fundo, à direita do balcão de pastéis.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh PUH-ruh puh-GAHR?

likely_response.local: Pode pagar na Caixa do Salão ou na Caixa da Loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN OHW NUH KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier in the salon or at the cashier in the shop.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier in the salon or at the cashier in the shop.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN OHW NUH KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pode pagar na Caixa do Salão ou na Caixa da Loja.

phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a sala de chá?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHAH?
phrases.cultural_note: The tea room serves the famous custard tarts in a traditional setting.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o caixa do salão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa para lhe indicar o caixa do salão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh PUH-ruh LYIH een-dee-KAHR AW KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a waiter to point you to the dining room cashier.

responses.english: Ask a waiter to point you to the dining room cashier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG aymp-rih-GAH-doo DIH MEH-zuh PUH-ruh LYIH een-dee-KAHR AW KEYE-shuh DOO suh-LOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte a um empregado de mesa para lhe indicar o caixa do salão.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I see the wood ovens?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso ver os fornos a lenha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo VEHR OOSH FOH-ruh-noosh AH LEH-nyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The ovens are visible through a glass partition for safety.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, são visíveis da sala de chá.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SOWN vee-ZEE-vaysh DUH SAH-luh DIH SHAH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are visible from the tea room.

responses.english: Good morning, they are visible from the tea room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SOWN vee-ZEE-vaysh DUH SAH-luh DIH SHAH.
responses.local: Bom dia, são visíveis da sala de chá.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa da sala de chá?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh DUH SAH-luh DIH SHAH?
phrases.cultural_note: The sit-down cashier is inside the main dining area, separate from the take-away counter.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sala de chá. A caixa fica lá.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHAH. AH KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh LAH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the tea room. The cashier is there.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the tea room. The cashier is there.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHAH. AH KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh LAH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a sala de chá. A caixa fica lá.
